states.name: Venus
states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: Venus, the goddess of love. Her beauty and maternal grace earned her the devotion of both gods and humans alike. But she has long been captive in an underground prison governed by the god of death. Her crime—murdering a god.

states.name: Venus
states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: However, it is rumored that a god driven mad with love for her was consumed by jealousy and tried to kill her, only to be struck down instead... in other words, it was self-defense. Yet whenever one asks her about the truth, she offers nothing but a mysterious smile.

states.name: Venus
states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: And so, the people, escaping the destruction of the foreign god, remained wary of the now-freed goddess. Is she truly an ally...? And yet, in time, their hearts were once again drawn toward her—toward the depths of her eyes, though none knew of her true intentions.
